data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Feature complete and validated by the full test suite (2468 passing), a 4-round adversarial design review (APPROVE), prior-art validation, and a live gated-close+signing demo. A monolithic whole-epic graph=True LLM verification exceeds the practical step budget (a documented limitation); child workstreams WS-1..5 are closed and individually verified.". Session: 86ef8e05.
